Message: Elements must only use supported ARIA attributes
ARIA attributes must conform to valid names
ARIA attributes must conform to valid values
Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
<html> element must have a lang attribute
Link has no text content or accessible name
Page has no <nav> landmark
Button has no text content or accessible name
Page has no <main> landmark
No skip-to-content link found near top of page
Image missing alt attribute
Form input has no associated label or aria-label
Certain ARIA roles must be contained by particular parents
Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children
Select element must have an accessible name
Zooming and scaling must not be disabled
Scrollable region must have keyboard access
Frames must have an accessible name
Documents must have <title> element to aid in navigation
Links must be distinguishable without relying on color
